rulings.Case Title: MELBA TYSON VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Administrative Mandate
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 29, 2017 line 1. PETITIONER MELBA TYSON's Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Administrative Mandate OFF CALENDAR, re-noticed for October 13, 2017.= (501/REQ)

Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 29, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT CINDY PON, ANGELA PON, WARREN W.K. PON,, and WARREN PON's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED. As to the second and third causes of action the motion is denied as Defendants failed to shift their burden. Defendants fails to address one of the basis for these causes of action - habitability; a motion for summary adjudication may not be granted if it does not dispose of the entire cause of action. As to the fourth cause of action the motion is DENIED as Defendants failed to shift their burden and show that there is no triable issue of fact regarding their reasonable ground to believe that Cindy Pon was "an owner of record." Cindy Pon attempts to show that she was "an owner" (equitable), but does not provide any evidence or argument that as a matter of law she had reasonable grounds to believe that she was "an owner of record."= (501/REQ)
